sutta: [Music] now the householder natha pindika surrounded by about 500 lay disciples visited the exalted 1 and after saluting sat down at 1 side then the exalted 1 addressed the variable sariputta and said sariputta any white frocked layperson you know who acts controlled in the 5 steps of the training and obtains that will easily and without difficulty the 4 very purposive uh mental abodes of ease here amid things seen may should he desire declare just the state of self by the self saying destroyed is held for me destroyed is animal rebirth destroyed is the realm of ghosts destroyed for me is the wavered way the ill way the ab is i am he who has won to the stream not subject to any falling away sure and bound for enlightenment he acts controlled in what 5 steps of training here in sarikuta the aryan disciple abstains from taking life from taking what is not given from fleshly lusts from lying and from drinking liquor that cause indolence the acts controlled in these 5 steps of the training what are the 4 aborts of ease very purposive he obtains that will here amid things seen here in sariputta the aryan disciple has unwavering faith in the buddha of the truth he is the exalted 1 buddha replete with practice and knowledge well gone 1 world war unsurpassed tamer of tameable men teacher of devas and men buddha bhagava this is the first very purposive abode of east 1 here amid things seen by purifying impure thought by cleansing unclean thought again sarikuta the aryan disciple has unwavering faith in dhamma well declared by the exalted 1 is dhamma 1 to be seen here and now timeless bidding [Music] 1 come and see to be understood by wise men each for himself this is the second abort of ease he has unwavering faith in the sangha well-trained is the exalted 1 sangha of disciples train in uprightness is the exalted ones sangha of disciples trained in methane is the exalted 1 sangha of disciples praying in the right way is the exalted 1 song of disciples the 4 pairs of men the 8 persons this is the exalted 1 sangha of disciples worthy of offerings worthy of hospitality worthy of gifts fit to be reverently saluted a field of merit none greater in the world this is the third abode of ease moreover sariputta the aryan disciple is possessed of virtues beloved by aryans whole unbroken and tarnished without blemish bringing freedom praised by wise men incorrupt conducive to concentration this is the fourth very purposive abode of ease 1 here amid things seen by purifying impure thought by cleansing unclean thought these are the 4 abodes of ease sariputta any white frogged lay person you know who acts controlled in these 5 steps of the training and obtains at will easily and without difficulty in these 4 very purposive abodes of ease here amid things seen may should he desire declare just the state of self by the self and say destroyed is hell for me destroyed this animal the birth destroyed is the realm of ghosts destroyed for me is the wavered way the ill way the abyss i am he who has 1 to the stream not subject to any falling away sure and bound for enlightenment that's the end of the suta
commentary:
here the buddha is saying if a lay person knows now that his the 5 precepts he [Music] uh keeps purely the 5 precepts and then he has confidence that he has unwavering faith in the buddha the dhamma and the sangha and also his precepts are pure then he can confidently say that he has attained sotapanna the first stage of aryahud and he will never be reborn into the 3 woeful planes again the realm of animals ghosts and the hell realm and he's bound for enlightenment that means at the most 7 more lifetimes as a human being before he attains [Music] so uh you see the 5 precepts we it's not difficult to see whether we keep it purely or not but the to have unwavering faith in the buddha dharma and sangha how do you have unwavering faith in the buddha dharma and sangha to have unwavering faith means have right view that means you have the basic understanding and how do you get right view it is mentioned in the majima nikaya i think is maybe perhaps sukta 43 where it is mentioned that uh there are 2 conditions for obtaining right view only 2 conditions 1 is listening to dhamma that means listening to the discourses of the buddha the second 1 is to have proper attention manasikara a thorough consideration when you are listening to the discourses of the buddha only with these 2 conditions you can obtain right view that means you already become a sotapanna that way that is why listening to the uh dhamma the sutasa is the first step that brings us into the rn eightfold path if you don't have that right view you have not come into the rn 84 path yet because it's mentioned in the majima nikaya i think suta 117 that the aryan eightfold path starts with the first factor which is right view and after you have right viewed that will lead you to have right thoughts and the right thoughts will lead you to have right speech that will lead you to have right action that will lead you to have right livelihood and then right effort then right mindfulness and right concentration that completes all the 8 factors so the first 1 to obtain right view it is very important that we study the sutas in detail i pay a lot of attention to the sutas then that is the way to get right view otherwise you find some people we had a case some time ago of somebody who meditated for 20 over years it seems and then i changed her religion and that shows that she did not even obtain the first factor of the rna4 pathway uh the other thing mentioned here is about uh perfect virtue perfect virtue does not mean that an arya does not have any minor transgressions of the precepts like it is mentioned in angutta nikaya 3.85 that even aryans can have minor transgressions of the reception and we find in 1 suta in the sanguita nikaya this mention that asakiyan by the name of sarakani he passed away and after he passed away they came to ask the buddha where he had taken rebirth and buddha said to the fact that not to worry about him is already a sotapanna and the people some people were a bit doubtful and some of them were quite annoyed because they said that sarakani failed in the training and took the drink field in the training means he disrobed as a monk took to drink means probably that he didn't take a very little drink he probably took quite a lot of drink that's why the people were annoyed so even a sotapanna can break the preceptor against drinking so um and so you can see here uh perfect virtue is not it's not uh um doesn't mean it doesn't include minor transgressions because the precept against liquor is not was not originally in the precepts the original precepts did not include drinking it was added later by the buddha and perfect sila in the aryan eightfold path and consists of the 3 factors of perfect right speech right action and right livelihood these 3 if you have these 3 factors of the aryan eightfold path and that is uh perfect sealer so from there you find actually uh the uh the first stage sotapana is not that difficult to achieve the main thing is we keep the precepts very purely and we listen to the sutasa with proper attention that can bring us the first stage of arya suta panna and this can be confirmed in some other suitas i'll deal with it later
